grants.title: IGSTC WISER — Women in Science & Engineering Research (Indo-German)
grants.description: Promotes collaboration between women researchers in India and Germany. Paired mode only — one Indian woman PI + one German woman PI required. Covers research staff, consumables, travel, and capacity building.

grants.title: Indo-Swiss Joint Research Programme (ISJRP) — ICMR/DBT/SNSF
grants.description: Joint call by ICMR + DBT (India) and Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF). Indian PI funded by ICMR/DBT; Swiss PI funded by SNSF. Focus: biomedical, health, and life sciences research. Live deadline: May 5, 2026.

grants.title: Indo-Swiss Joint Research Programme (ISJRP) — ICMR/DBT/SNSF 2026
grants.description: Joint call: ICMR + DBT (India) + Swiss NSF. Indian PI funded by ICMR/DBT; Swiss PI by SNSF. Deadline May 5, 2026.

grants.title: IUSSTF Indo-US Joint Research Program
grants.description: Joint research grants for Indian and US researchers. Covers exchanges, workshops, and collaborative projects.

grants.title: MeitY-NSF Joint Research Programme
grants.description: India-US joint call. Focus: semiconductors, next-gen communications, cybersecurity, green tech, intelligent transport. Indian team funded by MeitY.

grants.title: SPARC — Scheme for Promotion of Academic and Research Collaboration
grants.description: Joint proposals between Indian institutions and top-100 foreign universities. Covers exchange visits, joint workshops, and seed research grants.

grants.title: SPARC Proposal Template
grants.description: SPARC call: SPARC Proposal Template

grants.title: Login & Submit Proposal
grants.description: SPARC call: Login & Submit Proposal

grants.title: CEFIPRA Indo-French Joint Research Project (General)
grants.description: CEFIPRA/IFCPAR bilateral programme. Indian PI funded by DST; French PI by ANR. Covers joint research, researcher exchanges, workshops. All STEM disciplines. Proposals submitted in parallel to CEFIPRA (India) and ANR (France).

grants.title: CEFIPRA Indo-French ICT Research Programme
grants.description: ICT-focused bilateral call. Indian PI submits via CEFIPRA online + hard copy to CEFIPRA New Delhi; French PI submits to Inria separately. Focus: AI, networks, security, systems.

grants.title: IGSTC 2+2 Research Projects (Indo-German)
grants.description: Indo-German Science & Technology Centre flagship programme. 2 Indian + 2 German partners (academia + industry on each side). Applied research, technology transfer focus.

grants.title: IGSTC SING — Seed Networking Grant (Indo-German)
grants.description: Seed funding for initiating bilateral India-Germany research connections. Rolling call. Covers preliminary experiments, consumables, short visits, conference registration. Low-barrier entry point for Indo-German collaboration.

grants.title: DST-DFG Indo-German Joint Research (Science & Engineering)
grants.description: Joint research projects between Indian (DST/ANRF-funded) and German (DFG-funded) PIs. Proposals submitted in parallel — Indian PI to DST, German PI to DFG via elan system. Both agencies must recommend funding.

grants.title: DST-JSPS India-Japan Cooperative Science Programme (IJCSP)
grants.amount: Mobility grant — travel, per diem, workshop costs
grants.description: Joint research projects and workshops/seminars between Indian (DST) and Japanese (JSPS) researchers. Parallel submission required. Focus on mobility — exchange visits, seminars. Results notified Apr/May following year.

grants.title: Newton-Bhabha Fund — Indo-UK Joint Research
grants.description: UK-India bilateral fund managed by British Council and UKRI. Supports joint research, PhD placements, researcher exchanges, and workshops. Indian PI funded by DST/DBT/other Indian agency; UK PI by UKRI.

grants.title: UKRI-DST India Joint Initiative (via GCRF/IUK)
grants.description: Various UKRI calls explicitly open to India-UK partnerships. Indian partner typically funded by DST/DBT; UK partner by UKRI. Check UKRI opportunity finder filtered by 'India' for current calls.

grants.title: IUSSTF Joint Research Projects (Indo-US)
grants.description: Indo-US Science & Technology Forum. Indian PI funded by DST; US PI funded by NSF/NIH/DOE depending on theme. Also includes Virtual Network Centres and Joint Workshops.

grants.title: DST-MOST Indo-Israel Joint Research (S&T)
grants.description: Bilateral programme between DST (India) and Ministry of Science & Technology (Israel). Joint research in all S&T areas. Proposals submitted in parallel. Annual calls typically open Oct-Dec.

grants.title: DST-NRF Indo-Korea Joint Research Programme
grants.description: Joint research between Indian (DST) and Korean (NRF) researchers. Covers joint R&D projects and bilateral visits. Annual call.

grants.title: DST-CSIRO India-Australia Strategic Research Fund
grants.description: Joint bilateral fund between DST and CSIRO (Australia). Focus on areas of mutual interest: agriculture, water, clean energy, health. Indian PI funded by DST, Australian by CSIRO.

grants.title: Royal Society International Exchanges — Cost Share
grants.description: Seed funding for new collaborations between UK and international researchers. India participates in the Cost Share scheme (funded by both RS and Indian agency). Covers short visits and workshops up to £12,000. Rolling deadline.

grants.title: DST-DAAD Personnel Exchange Programme (PPP) — Indo-German
grants.amount: Travel + per diem (DST norms for Indian side)
grants.description: Bilateral MoU between DAAD and DST. Supports researcher exchanges for joint research projects. Indian PI applies to DST; German PI to DAAD. Covers travel + per diem for both teams. Well-established channel.

grants.title: NIH Fogarty FIRCA — International Research Collaboration Award
grants.description: Designed specifically for researchers in LMICs including India. Indian PI collaborates with NIH-funded US researcher. Indian PI applies directly — best NIH entry point for Indian researchers.

grants.title: DST India-France Call for Proposals (Applied Mathematics & AI)
grants.description: Joint Indo-French call in Applied Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence. Coordinated by DST (India) and ANR (France). Annual call.

grants.title: MeitY-NSF Joint Research Programme
grants.description: India-US bilateral for semiconductors, next-gen communications, cybersecurity, green tech, intelligent transport. Indian PI applies to MeitY; US PI to NSF. Single joint proposal, reviewed by NSF as coordinating agency.
